CheckTitle: CloudWatch Alarms are Set for Lambda Function Error Rate
CheckType: Software and Configuration Checks/AWS Security Best Practices/Runtime Behavior Analysis
Description: Ensure that CloudWatch alarms are configured to monitor the error rate of Lambda functions to detect issues or failures.
Risk: Lack of monitoring for Lambda function error rates can lead to undetected issues or failures in your serverless applications.

Recommendation.Text: Ensure CloudWatch alarms are configured to monitor the error rate of all Lambda functions.
